article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.8. CC - Toyota Tacoma Pickup Trucks 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on: Buying 3 more Toyota Tacoma trucks for $174,384
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on adding three Toyota Tacoma pickup trucks to the City's Engineering fleet for an estimated $174,384 including taxes. The trucks would replace three aging vehicles, which would then be sold at auction.
